user.title: Create room
user.description:
Enter a name for the room.

Allowed characters: {allowed_chars}
Length: {min_length}-{max_length} characters

Examples for valid names: GrowRoom1, grow_box, Grow-Room-1, Anbaukasten

error.invalid_room_name: Invalid room name. Only letters (a-z, A-Z), numbers (0-9), underscores (_) and hyphens (-) are allowed.
error.invalid_length: Room name must be between {min_length} and {max_length} characters long.
